title: crataegus tanacetifolia var. orientalis
intro: Crataegus tanacetifolia var. orientalis, also known as the Oriental hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant native to Eastern Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to regulate cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Crataegus tanacetifolia var. orientalis include reducing high blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and protecting against cardiovascular diseases. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and capsules, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
